title: RouteDock Manifest
description: Discovery manifest served at /.well-known/routedock.json on every RouteDock provider endpoint

routedock.description: Manifest schema version. Always '1.0' for this version.

description.description: Human-readable description of the provider's data or service

modes.description: Payment modes supported by this provider

network.description: Stellar network this provider operates on

asset_contract.description: Stellar Asset Contract (SAC) address for the payment asset

pricing.description: Pricing configuration per supported payment mode

endpoints.description: Map of endpoint name to HTTP method + path (e.g. { 'price': 'GET /price' })

tags.description: Capability tags indexed with trigram search in the provider registry

PricingConfig.description: Per-request pricing for x402 or mpp-charge modes

amount.description: Cost per request in the payment asset (decimal string, e.g. '0.001')

per.description: Billing unit — always 'request' for non-session modes

facilitator.description: x402 facilitator URL (required for x402 mode). OpenZeppelin Channels endpoint.

rate.description: Cost per voucher in the payment asset (decimal string, e.g. '0.0001')

per.description: Billing unit — always 'voucher' for session mode

channel_contract.description: Soroban contract address (C...) for the one-way-channel contract

min_deposit.description: Minimum initial deposit to open a channel (decimal string)

refund_waiting_period_ledgers.description: Ledgers the server has to settle before the funder can reclaim. Default: 17280 (~24h). Do not reduce in production.
